content_body: Fresh mountain air, rocking chairs, a roaring fire with hard-earned firewood. A table full of delicious food. The quiet rush of a nearby river. The sun setting over the trees. Robin egg, blue skies, cotton ball clouds. But the best part. . . creating lifelong memories with seven women who I love and adore. Thank you for the best birthday adventure!
title: A Beautiful, Birthday Adventure at Hidden Laurel Lodge
